## Checklist

- [ ] Focused change, follows the existing style (see [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md))
- [ ] `odin test canvas`, `odin test editor`, `odin test runner` pass
- [ ] The IDE builds (`build.bat` / `./build.sh`)
- [ ] Added tests for new pure logic (if applicable)
- [ ] If a `canvas` function was added: updated `rune/docs.odin` + `rune/autocomplete.odin`
- [ ] For UI changes: verified visually (screenshot appreciated)
